title: Tao Te Ching 9
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 9 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 9 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: To hold and fill a cup to overflowing is not as good as stopping in time. Temper a blade too sharp and its edge will not last long.
